job.title: Java Full Stack Developer @ Vashist Technologies (TN, IN)
job.description:
**Full Stack Developer**

JOB SUMMARY

We are looking for a passionate and motivated Full Stack Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate should have experience in developing scalable web applications, working on both front-end and back-end technologies, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

**Job Type**

\* Full-time

**Location**

\*18th main road, chennai, Tamil Nadu.

**Experience**

\* 0 –3 years (Freshers with strong project experience are welcome to apply.)

**Responsibilities**

\* Design, develop, test, and maintain web applications.

\* Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces.

\* Develop and integrate RESTful APIs.

\* Write clean, reusable, and maintainable code.

\* Optimize application performance and troubleshoot issues.

\* Participate in code reviews and follow development best practices.

\* Maintain project documentation and technical reports.

**Required Skills**

\* HTML5

\* CSS3

\* JavaScript (ES6+)

\* React.js / Angular / Vue.js

\* Node.js & Express.js

\* REST API Development

\* SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL)

\* MongoDB

\* Git & GitHub

\* Responsive Web Design

\* Problem Solving & Debugging

\* Basic understanding of Cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) is an advantage.

**Preferred Qualifications**

\* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

\* Good understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC).

\* Strong analytical and communication skills.

\* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

\* Eagerness to learn new technologies.

**Benefits**

\* Competitive salary

\* Career growth opportunities

\* Learning and development programs

\* Friendly and collaborative work environment

\* Exposure to modern technologies and real-world projects

**How to Apply**

Interested candidates can apply through Indeed or send their updated resume to [hsvashista.tech@gmail.com].

We look forward to welcoming talented developers to our team!

Pay: ₹150,000.00 - ₹180,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: Associate Software Engineer @ Kran Consulting Private Limited (NL, IN)
job.description:
**1. Software Development:**

§ Write, test, and debug code for new software applications or features under the guidance of senior engineers.

§ Participate in the design and implementation of software solutions, following established coding standards and best practices.

§ Develop, review, and optimize code for performance, scalability, and maintainability.

§ Should integrate software components into a fully functional software system that operates seamlessly as specified in the Software Requirements Specification (SRS).

§ Should analyse application functionality and suggest improvements to enhance efficiency and user experience.

**2. Collaboration and Teamwork:**

§ Work closely with team members, including senior developers, project manager, designers etc to understand project requirements and contribute to solutions.

§ Participate in regular team meetings and discussions, such as daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and code reviews.

§ Provide feedback on others code through code reviews and accept constructive feedback to improve personal coding practices.

§ Guide junior developers by providing technical training, mentorship, and support.

§ Identify areas for process improvement and contribute to implementing best practices.

**3. Testing and Quality Assurance:**

§ Create and execute unit tests to verify that code meets requirements and is free from errors.

§ Collaborate with quality assurance (QA) team members to troubleshoot and resolve issues and bugs.

**4. Documentation:**

§ Write and maintain documentation for code, technical specifications, and workflows to facilitate collaboration and future maintenance.

§ Update internal knowledge bases with insights and solutions that can help other developers.

**5. Debugging and Troubleshooting:**

§ Identify, diagnose, and fix bugs in the codebase.

§ Use debugging tools and techniques to resolve issues and ensure applications run smoothly.

Collaborate with support teams to address software issues reported by users

**6. Version Control and Code Management:**

§ Use version control systems like Git for code management, ensuring proper commit messages and adherence to branching strategies.

§ Collaborate with team members on code repositories and participate in code and functionality reviews.

**7. Learning and Skill Development:**

§ Stay up-to-date with industry trends, new technologies, and best practices in software engineering.

§ Take the initiative to deepen technical knowledge and skills, such as learning new programming languages or frameworks relevant to the company’s technology stack.

§ Develop a strong understanding of the specific domain or industry the company operates in.

**8. Project and Task Management:**

§ Use in-house project management tool (Galaxy ALMS) to track and manage assigned tasks, ensuring they are completed within deadlines.

§ Provide updates on task progress and escalate any blockers or issues that may affect timelines.

**9. Agile and Project Lifecycle Participation:**

§ Participate actively in agile practices, such as sprint planning, retrospectives, and backlog grooming.

§ Work with project manager and stakeholders to refine project requirements and prioritize tasks effectively.

In summary, an Associate Software Engineer is expected to contribute directly to development projects, collaborate effectively with team members and progressively take on more complex coding tasks. This role requires initiative, a willingness to learn and the ability to contribute meaningfully to both team and project objectives.

Pay: ₹350,135.65 - ₹593,398.50 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Software Engineer IV @ MRI Software (GJ, IN)
job.description:
**About the Role**

We are looking for an experienced developer to join our Asset Management platform team. The role spans a Ruby on Rails application, a standalone React PWA companion app, and a legacy ASP.NET WebForms. Backed by SQL Anywhere, which we are migrating to MS SQL Server. You will own features end-to-end across modern and legacy stacks in a long-lived enterprise product used across the social housing sector.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Deliver features across the Rails backend and its jQuery/Backbone frontend
* Write and optimise SQL for SQL Anywhere and MS SQL Server; queries, stored procedures, indexing, schema migrations
* Maintain and extend the React PWA companion ap. State management, offline sync, service workers
* Maintain and extend the ASP.NET WebForms application, including SSRS reports and ADO.NET data access
* Support enterprise SSO integrations (Azure AD, Okta, SAML/WS-Federation)
* Maintain SOAP/XML service integrations in the Rails application
* Write and maintain automated tests across the stack — RSpec/Capybara (Rails), Jest and Cypress (React PWA)

**Required Skills**

* 2+ years of experience on Ruby on Rails — feature delivery, ActiveRecord, server-side rendering with legacy JS frontend
* jQuery / CoffeeScript / Backbone.js — comfortable working in and extending a legacy frontend codebase
* SQL Anywhere and/or MS SQL Server — confident query writing, stored procedures, schema migrations
* React PWA with Redux and Redux-Saga
* Git, RSpec, Jest, Cypress

**Nice to Have**

* JRuby / WAR-based deployment
* ASP.NET WebForms — maintaining and extending legacy .NET applications
* PWA fundamentals — service workers, offline-first patterns
* SSRS / ReportViewer
* Enterprise authentication — OAuth2, SAML, Okta, Azure AD
* DevOps pipeline management — Azure Pipelines and GitHub Actions
* Social housing or property asset management domain knowledge

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field

**Benefits:**

* Flexible to work in Rotational Shifts arrangements (Hybrid-3 days in the office)
* Annual performance-related bonus
* 6x Flexi Anyday: knock 2.5 hours off your day on any day
* Engaging, fun & inclusive culture: check out the MRI Software APAC Insta feed and stories!

**About Us**

From the day we opened our doors, MRI Software has built flexible, game-changing real estate software that powers thriving communities and helps make the world a better place to live, work and play. Fulfilling that mission is only possible because of one thing: exceptional people. People like you!

Our people-first approach to PropTech is defining a new industry standard for client experiences that, quite frankly, can’t be duplicated. Experiences that deliver real value every day. And we know those experiences begin with our people.

We believe MRI is more than just a workplace; it’s a connected community of people who truly feel they belong. Whether we’re investing in employee resource groups or providing tailored resources for each person to reach their full potential, we’re passionate about creating a work environment that makes you excited to show up every single day.

At MRI, one of our core values is to *strive to amaze.* From the intelligent solutions we create to the culture we cultivate, that’s our goal every day. Because that’s what industry leaders do. Whether you’re joining as a new Pride member or rejoining us after a short time away, your talent is vital to us, our partners and our clients.

**Amazing growth requires amazing employees. Are you up to the challenge?**

We know confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting remarkable candidates, so please don’t hesitate to apply. We’d love to hear from you!

*MRI is proud to be an inclusive employer. We welcome and celebrate diversity across all backgrounds, including ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, age, military, veteran status and more.*

*We believe that Belonging is a direct result of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion. Those values are woven into the fabric of who we are and are foundational to our continued success. Come and see for yourself!*

job.title: R&D Senior Engineer @ ABB (KA, IN)
job.description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

R&D Project Manager

**Your role and responsibilities:**

In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research & Development (R&D) team.

The work model for the role is: #L1 Hybrid

This role is contributing to the AUPI IDS Division in Bangalore, India

You will be mainly accountable for:

* To provide broad technical software support, training, pilots and consulting services for clients and to carry out the
* implementation of software products in pulp and paper industry
* Digital project implementation in pulp and paper industry
* Work with Project Managers to define scope, features and estimates for product development.
* Work directly on development tasks; provide technical leadership; coordinate with other resources and create high
* quality products within the defined schedules and budgets.
* Work with customers to define new opportunities for plant level applications.
* Should be proficient or have the capability of becoming proficient at installing, configuring, developing a workflow process, troubleshooting the software, and staying current with upgrades, updates and patches.
* Plan and do technological training for customer key users or internal team.

Qualifications for the role:

* Should have experience in developing at least one application as a full stack developer.
* Deep knowledge of Object-oriented programming and Design patterns.
* Working with Pulp & paper industry applications & knowledge of any DCS/PLC/SCADA applications will be an added advantage.
* Must 10+ years of experience in application design and development using .NET framework, C#.
* Experience in developing REST APIs and Micro Service / Containerized applications is needed.
* Should have proficiency in fundamental front-end languages such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript and React.
* Experience with JS-based tools including Jasmin, Bower, Grunt and Gulp is preferred.
* Familiarity with Gen AI tools like copilot is highly preferred.
* Knowledge of OPC DA/HDA/UA specifications and implementing the client using C++ & C# is a plus.
* Experience of Relational database Oracle / SQL Server, time series database.
* Should have excellent troubleshooting skills & good problem-solving skills.

More about US:

The Process Industries Division serves the mining, minerals processing, metals, cement, pulp and paper, battery manufacturing, and food and beverage, as well as their associated service industries. The Division brings deep industry domain expertise coupled with the ability to integrate both automation and electrical systems, increase productivity and reduce overall capital and operating costs for customers. For mining, metals and cement customers, solutions include specialized products and services, as well as total production systems. The Division designs, plans, engineers, supplies, installs and commissions integrated electrical and motion systems, including electric equipment, drives, motors, high power rectifiers and equipment for automation and supervisory control within a variety of areas including mineral handling, mining operations, aluminum smelting, hot and cold steel applications and cement production. The offering for the pulp and paper industries includes control systems, quality control systems, drive systems, on-line sensors, actuators and field instruments. Digitalization solutions, including collaborative operations and augmented reality, help improve plant and enterprise productivity, and reduce maintenance and energy costs.

Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.

Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

Recruitment Fraud Warning

ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.

View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home

For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how-to-apply/fraud-warning

job.title: Project Manager – Python | Agile | AWS | Client Delivery @ New media Guru Pvt. Ltd (HR, IN)
job.description:
Who We're Looking For

We're seeking a **Technical Project Manager** who started their career as a **Software Developer (Python, PHP, Java, or Full Stack)** and has progressed into project management. If you're passionate about technology, enjoy working with clients, and can lead teams while maintaining technical depth, we'd love to hear from you.

* Coordinate with clients for requirement gathering, solution discussions, estimations, and project planning.
* Create project plans, timelines, sprint schedules, and resource allocation strategies.
* Work closely with developers, QA, UI/UX designers, and DevOps teams.
* Monitor project progress, identify risks, and ensure timely delivery within scope and budget.
* Drive Agile ceremonies including Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-ups, Reviews, and Retrospectives.
* Mentor engineering teams and ensure adherence to development best practices.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define project scope, priorities, and delivery milestones.
* Manage change requests, issue resolution, and client communication throughout the project lifecycle.
* Ensure high-quality software delivery and excellent customer satisfaction.

Required Skills

* 7+ years of experience in software development and technical project management.
* Strong understanding of **Python, Flask, Django**, or similar backend technologies.
* Hands-on knowledge of software architecture, REST APIs, Microservices, MVC, and scalable application design.
* Experience with **AWS**, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS Lambda, and cloud-based deployments.
* Good understanding of databases such as MySQL and Elasticsearch.
* Familiarity with Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, JWT, SSO, and AWS Cognito.
* Experience using Jira, Trello, or similar project management tools.
* Strong knowledge of Agile, Scrum, and Kanban methodologies.
* Excellent client communication, stakeholder management, and team leadership skills.

Why Join NMG Technologies?

* Work on exciting AI-driven, cloud, web, and enterprise software projects.
* Opportunity to work directly with international clients.
* Collaborative engineering culture with talented technical teams.
* Career growth into Delivery Management and Engineering Leadership.
* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
* Stable and fast-growing organization with global presence.

Pay: Up to ₹1,600,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: DevOps @ Zensar Technologies (IN)
job.description:
Key Responsibilities
  

* Continuous Integration & Delivery: Design, maintain, and enhance CI/CD pipelines to build, test, and deploy software across multiple environments. Ensure build failures are promptly investigated and fixed, collaborating with development teams to maintain smooth code integration and release processes.
* Infrastructure & Environment Management: Oversee development and test environment stability, including managing Linux (Red Hat Enterprise Linux) servers and virtualization resources (VMs) to support build and deployment processes. Monitor critical systems (e.g., build agents, integration servers) and troubleshoot infrastructure issues (e.g., restarting offline servers or VM instances) to minimize downtime.
* Release Management & Automation: Manage software releases and artifact repositories, including building and publishing container images (Docker) to Artifactory or similar artifact repositories. Coordinate the packaging of software components and delivery of deployment artifacts to various internal or client environments.
* Operational Support & Maintenance: Participate in Development Enablement support schedules to ensure high availability and quick incident response for our applications in development environments. Coordinate OS and infrastructure patching cycles in collaboration with central patch management teams – accept, track, and close patch tasks via ServiceNow/ITSM tools. Validate that systems (Linux RHEL servers) are properly patched and restored, including verifying BigFix agent connectivity and server availability during scheduled patch windows.
* Collaboration & Communication: Work closely with global colleagues across development, QA, security, and infrastructure teams to ensure seamless integration of new software components and timely resolution of environment issues. Communicate status updates, challenges, and solutions effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including external partners when required.

Required Technical Skills
  

* Programming & Scripting: Proficiency in at least one programming language (e.g., Java, Python, or similar) for developing automation scripts and tooling. Familiarity with shell scripting (Bash, PowerShell) for system tasks and build automation is essential.
* Version Control: Strong experience with Git and related platforms such as GitHub/Bitbucket for source code management, branching, and collaboration.
* CI/CD Tooling: Hands-on experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins and GitHub Actions.
* Containerization & Virtualization: Solid understanding of container technologies (Docker) including building, managing, and deploying container images to registries (JFrog Artifactory). Familiarity with virtualization platforms and managing VM-based environments is important for our development and testing setups.
* Monitoring & Troubleshooting: Experience with system monitoring and logging solutions to ensure application uptime and performance. Ability to diagnose build and system issues in complex multi-component environments and implement hotfixes or coordinate long-term solutions.

Required Operational/DevOps Skills
  

* Operating Systems & Patching: Strong knowledge of Linux systems (preferably RHEL) and hands-on experience with system administration tasks. This includes applying OS patches/updates, managing services and daemons, and troubleshooting server and network issues. Familiarity with patch management tools (e.g., IBM BigFix or similar) and processes for scheduled maintenance windows is required.
* Platform & Environment Management: Proven ability to manage development & test environments, including coordinating environment changes, resource provisioning, and configuration management. Comfort with virtualization (VM) management and basic cloud or on-premise infrastructure operations is expected.
* Continuous Deployment & Automation: Expertise in automating deployment processes, from build to release, ensuring smooth and repeatable deployments (Harness). Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code or automated configuration management (e.g., Ansible, Terraform) is beneficial for environment setup and consistency, though not strictly required.
* Cloud & Orchestration: Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS) and container orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker Swarm) is expected, as our environments are already in the cloud or moving to it quickly.
* Performance & Reliability: Demonstrated skill in maintaining application and infrastructure reliability. Will be responsible for monitoring system health, quickly identifying root causes of issues (from failing builds to server outages) and implementing preventive measures to improve system uptime and performance. Experience with incident response and post-mortem processes in DevOps or SRE capacity is a plus.

Security & Compliance Skills
  

* Secure CI/CD Practices: Experience integrating security scanning tools into the build and release cycles is essential. This includes configuring and using Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tools (e.g., Checkmarx or alternatives) and Software Composition Analysis (SCA) solutions to detect vulnerabilities in code and dependencies.
* Container & Artifact Security: Proficiency with container image scanning (e.g., vulnerability scanning of Docker images) and artifact security checks to ensure compliance with security standards. Knowledge of container security platforms or scanning tools is a key requirement.
* Compliance & Audits: Familiarity with working in highly regulated environments or with clients who require rigorous compliance. Examples include participating in code escrow and independent build verification processes with third-party auditors. The role will involve coordinating with external parties to ensure that source code escrow deposits and rebuild verifications meet contractual and regulatory requirements.
* Vulnerability Management: Strong understanding of patch and vulnerability management principles. Should be comfortable addressing known vulnerabilities (e.g., via CVE remediation) and working with centralized teams (like CVPI – Central Vulnerability Patch Implementation) to ensure our servers and applications remain secure and up-to-date.

Nice-to-Have Skills
  

* Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Familiarity with IaC tools (Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible) and configuration management for automated environment setup and scaling.
* Observability & Monitoring Tooling: Experience with advanced monitoring, logging, and alerting platforms (e.g., ELK stack, Dynatrace, Splunk or similar) is a plus, ensuring you can instrument and watch over system health effectively.
* AI & Automation: Use of AI agents and AI-assisted tooling is a significant plus. We value innovative engineers who leverage AI-driven solutions – such as automation bots, intelligent CI assistants, or coding copilots – to improve productivity, code quality, and operational efficiency.

General Qualifications
  

* Education & Experience: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent work experience). Proven experience in DevOps, site reliability, or infrastructure-focused software engineering role. While we are flexible on years of experience, a strong track record in relevant areas is essential.
* Problem-Solving & Adaptability: Excellent troubleshooting abilities and a proactive approach to solving complex technical challenges. Ability to quickly learn new technologies and integrate them into existing processes.
* Team Collaboration: Strong communication skills and experience working in cross-functional teams and multi-location environments. You will interact with software developers, QA engineers, IT infrastructure teams, and external partners, so the ability to collaborate and coordinate effectively is key.
* Process Orientation: Understanding software development lifecycle and change management processes. Experience with IT service management (ITSM) tools (e.g., ServiceNow for change/incident ticketing) is beneficial for handling deployments, patches, and compliance tasks.
* Self-Motivation: A self-starter mentality with ownership of tasks and projects from conception to delivery. The ideal candidate is driven to continually refine processes, proactively address issues, and keep systems running smoothly.

job.title: Software Engineer @ Qualys (MH, IN)
job.description:
Come work at a place where innovation and teamwork come together to support the most exciting missions in the world!

We are seeking a highly motivated and talented Software Engineer to work on Qualys’ next-generation data platform and middleware. Working alongside a very talented team of engineers and architects, you will be responsible for prototyping, designing, developing and supporting a highly scalable SaaS based cloud security data platform. This is a great opportunity to be an integral part of a team building Qualys’ next generation microservices based technology platform processing over a 100 million transactions and terabytes of data per day, leverage open source technologies, and work on challenging and business-impacting projects.  
  
**Responsibilities**  
  
As a data platform engineer, you will be responsible for engineering of services running data stored with millions of transactions per second, scaling to 100s of terabytes of data. You will be responsible for driving the data source and providing data platform as a service to all applications built in Qualys.

You will be reviewing the application architecture and identifying the data scale needs. Investigate the cutting-edge technologies and do POC and then responsible for rolling out in production. Be the face and developer advocate of the stack you own and contribute back to open-source community if any enhancement needed to fit in Qualys ecosystem.

You will be instrumenting both day 1 and day 2 operations on these data technologies keeping the 100s of thousands if not millions of operations per second. Migrate, burst into cloud and scale the stack with zero or least amount of downtime.

You will be responsible for delivering resilient client SDKs to the applications to communicate with the data source you are responsible for.

You will be constantly in the hunt for better solutions out there to resolve the current scaling, availability and cost-effective alternative solutions.

Co-develop with a strong sense of ownership Qualys’ big-data platform that scales to meet/exceed the demands of processing over a 100 million transactions and terabytes of data per day. Architecture, performance, scalability, high availability and security will be your primary goals for delivering a first-rate experience to our customers.

Work closely with engineering teams, product management and operations to provide platform and infrastructure features and components to support Qualys’ business objectives.

Produce high quality software following good architecture and design principles that you and your team will find easy to work with in the future.

**A day in the life…**

* Apply advanced concepts, theories and principles to create multi-disciplinary innovations and solutions for the most complex or risky data source related situations

* Contribute to development of new data platform principles and concepts

* Collaborate with and suggest best practices to application teams in Qualys

* Provide thought leadership across multiple teams to ensure that systems and services are designed, and operating to achieve optimal levels of performance, reliability and sustainability interacting with data platform in Qualys

* Ensure security coding practices and security system fundamentals across multiple teams

* Demonstrate ability to identify important areas to instrument across multiple teams

**Who you****are...**

* A trendsetter. You thrive in an intellectually challenging environment with leading edge technologies.

* A teacher. You’re able to mentor your peers and help our team grow.

* A learner. You have an insatiable thirst for knowledge and greater understanding.

* A pragmatist. Your goal is to create useful products, not build technology for technology’s sake.

* An empath. You understand what the customer needs and use that perspective to create the best user experience.

**How we work...**

* With others. We have remote pairing tools where engineers often work together, as well as virtual collaboration tools for building out architecture solutions.

* With transparency. We encourage open dialog and discourse. We don’t encourage silos.

* With agility. We don’t believe in following a process for process’s sake. We ship frequently and focus on delivering incremental value.

* With open minds. We are committed to building a diverse team of people with unique perspectives. This encourages a healthy and inclusive environment that builds a more sustainable, successful company.

* With pride. We value our people most of all. We invest in ourselves by applying our own strengths and interests to company needs.

**Qualifications**

* BS/MS degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Applied Math or related field.

* 2+ years hands-on experience with developing SaaS based software products and solutions for service-oriented deployments in public (AWS, GCP, Azure, OCI, etc.) or private clouds.

* Strong in data structures and algorithms.

* Strong analytical and debugging skills.

* Data-driven critical thinking problem-solving

* Ability to clearly articulate and communicate technical concepts within and across teams.

* Prior experience working with/using any kind of distributed data systems like Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Cassandra, Spark, Hadoop big data system, Apache flink stream processing, OLAP systems like Clickhouse.

* Demonstrated passion for innovation with an ability to work within agile software development methodologies

* Experience with infrastructure orchestration and automation tools (Terraform)

* Hands-on experience using CI/CD pipelines

* Java programming skills including object-oriented design, prototyping, development, testing, profiling, etc.

* Foundation knowledge of JVM concepts like garbage collection, heap, stack, profiling, class loading, etc.

* Knowledge of the below is a plus

* Deep understanding of Distributed Systems concepts

* Experience with applying data encryption and data security standards.

* Experience with container and orchestration technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes etc.

* Experience with monitoring tools such as Graphite, Grafana and Prometheus.

* Experience with HashiCorp technologies such as Consul, Vault, Terraform and Vagrant.

* Experience with configuration management tools such as Chef, Puppet or Ansible.

* In-depth experience with continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines.

* Exposure to Maven, Ant or Gradle for builds.

job.title: Lead Android Developer @ Webstrail LLP (TS, IN)
job.description:
**ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES**

* Coordinates technical tasks and ensures teams are working efficiently; oversees the development/support of specific IT areas and systems, and timely delivery of projects. (25%)
* Contributes to defining new business requirements; identifies and communicates risks to the business; investigates and proposes new tools and frameworks to deliver quality products faster. (10%)
* Acts as a liaison between project management, technical teams and IT leadership; assures best practices are defined and followed; drives consistency across applications and projects wherever possible. (5%)
* Manages all aspects of coding for the team – branching, code review, ensuring code reusability and maintainability with constant refactoring, collaboration with Enterprise Architecture team on standards and approaches.
* Ultimately accountable for the quality of the code for the project. (10%) Coding project deliverables (25%)
* Mentor developers and help resolve technical roadblocks; conduct collaborative code reviews and coordinate the deployment and implementation of software solutions; recognize organizational/team challenges and address them with management. (20%)
* Available for production application deployment and troubleshooting hours and/or on an on-call basis. (5%)

**SUPERVISORY RESPONSIBILITIES:**

This position does not have formal supervisory responsibility; however, it has overall leadership responsibility for the work of team members in the context of technical leadership.

**DECISION-MAKING RESPONSIBILITIES:**

This position requires independent decision-making and recommendations within the context of assigned projects, stakeholders, and management teams.

**EDUCATION/EXPERIENCE:**

* 8+ years’ software development experience including creating business applications with relational and non-relational database systems, within a fast-paced software development environment.

* Experience in production support activities by monitoring and troubleshooting production issues.
* Experience in source control management using GIT.
* Effective independent, team player and self-starter with high adaptability to modern technologies.
* Additional desirable skills and experience include:
* Transportation and logistics industry experience (desirable).
* Strong proficiency in at least one of the following roles: business analyst, project manager, and data analyst.
* **JOB RELATED COMPETENCIES: Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills -**
* Focus on data driven analysis for solutioning and problem solving.
* Encourages creative problem solving and lateral thinking to foster innovative solutions.
* Identifies opportunities to increase accuracy and optimize resources; develops/recommends/implements solutions.

o Maintains strict confidentiality, high integrity, and high reliability.

job.title: Full Stack Software Developer @ SAKSHAM (UL, IN)
job.description:
Full-Stack Software Developer

Job Opening Requirement

Position Full-Stack Software Developer

Employment Type Full-Time

Experience Required 2+ Years

Work Mode On-site

Role Overview

We are looking for a highly capable Full-Stack Software Developer with 3–6 years of full-time professional experience. The ideal candidate is an individual who can independently handle end-to-end execution from initial architecture design to final deployment while embracing cutting-edge paradigms like AI-augmented software engineering to scale delivery without sacrificing architectural integrity. We value engineers who are technically versatile and genuinely curious, comfortable moving across stacks (Java and Node.js alike) and quick to pick up new tools, frameworks, and platforms as project needs evolve.

Key Responsibilities & Requirements

* End-to-End Delivery: Proven experience building complete web applications entirely from concept up to deployment.
* Experience Level: 3–6 years of full-time, hands-on professional software development experience.
* Full-Stack Proficiency: Strong full-stack development skills covering frontend, backend, and database architectural layers.
* Core Tech Stack: Practical experience building systems with React.js, Java Spring Boot, REST APIs, and SQL databases; working knowledge of Node.js is a strong plus, with a genuine willingness to work across both Java and Node ecosystems as needed.
* System Architecture: Ability to design highly scalable and structurally secure system architectures.
* AI-Assisted Engineering: Proficiency leveraging AI-assisted development tools (such as Cursor AI, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Claude) to accelerate workflows and improve delivery cycles.
* Security & Access Control: Direct experience implementing robust authentication, authorization protocols, and role-based access control (RBAC).
* UI Delivery: Ability to engineer highly responsive and user-friendly interface components.
* Data Layer Management: Strong database design, schema structuring, and query optimization skills.
* DevOps & Infrastructure: Experience deploying and maintaining live applications within cloud infrastructures or standalone Linux server environments.
* Modern Workflows: Deep knowledge of version control using Git alongside standard collaborative development workflows.
* Code Craftsmanship: Ability to consistently write clean, highly maintainable, and well-documented source code.
* Execution & Autonomy: Strong problem-solving, debugging, and software performance optimization skills, paired with the ability to work independently to deliver milestones within agreed timelines.
* Adaptability & Continuous Learning: Comfort learning new languages, frameworks, and tools quickly, and adapting to whichever stack a project calls for.
* Third-Party Integration: Hands-on experience integrating diverse third-party APIs, SDKs, and external services into production applications.

Preferred Qualifications

* Direct experience building large-scale Content Management Systems (CMS), Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) tools, and complex enterprise software systems.
* Practical UI/UX design experience.
* Native or cross-platform mobile application development experience.
* Hands-on experience integrating diverse third-party APIs and commercial payment gateways.
* Exposure to microservices architecture and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

* full stack software : 2 years (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Solutions Engineer @ Couchbase, Inc. (MH, IN)
job.description:
Couchbase, the operational data platform for AI, empowers businesses to succeed by bringing data to life in new ways. Major market-leading companies rely on Couchbase for mission critical operational, analytical, mobile and AI workloads. Built to replace legacy infrastructure and fragmented data services, Couchbase empowers enterprises with a unified platform architected for performance, flexibility and global scale.

With Couchbase, organizations bring their data to life, launching game‑changing customer experiences, exploring the limitless potential of AI, and seamlessly extending applications from the cloud to the edge and beyond. Couchbase's AI‑ready technology and enterprise partnership model eliminate complexity and reduce total cost of ownership, enabling teams to stay agile, innovative and secure.

Couchbase believes data should never slow you down, but act as the foundation for your next breakthrough. Discover why Couchbase is trusted to help the world's biggest players scale, move fast and stay resilient, no matter what's next on their roadmap. Visit couchbase.com and follow us on LinkedIn and X.  
  
Want to be part of our story? Apply today!

**Sr Solutions Engineer**  
  
We are looking for a Sr Solution Engineer in Mumbai to support the rapidly growing Couchbase user community and help drive customer success.  
  
Our Solution (Pre-Sales) Engineers are the primary technical field experts, responsible for actively driving and managing the technical components of a sales engagement. This includes explaining Couchbase advantages and differentiators, and how our Couchbase solutions stack meets these customer challenges, all while getting customers excited about using this new approach for delivering consistent business value.  
  
This specific position focuses on assisting customers who interact with our technology via application code and the application development process. This development centric position requires experience in presales, software development experience as well as time developing business solutions. Experience with one or more Enterprise Programming Languages and Solution Development methodologies.  
  
**Location: Mumbai**

  

Responsibilities  
  

* Operate in a consultative process with customers and prospects to define their challenges and opportunities. Map these challenges to the Couchbase Ecosystem by presenting differentiating and sustainable business value.
* Educate and become a trusted advisor and challenge assumptions and current status while delivering value to the prospects and customers.
* Present art of the possible and think outside the box approaches and solutions.
* Support technical and business discovery activities including workshops, demonstrations, across multiple opportunities
* Work closely with the sales team on account strategy and identifying additional opportunities in existing and new accounts. Ensuring the success of customer PoC/Pilots through effective management of acceptance criteria and issue escalation/resolution.
* Develop and deliver exceptional and engaging company/product presentations and demonstrations. Work with all technical levels from managers, to architects and developers and explain the Couchbase Ecosystem and its applicability to business objectives and business value
* Be the technical product expert and advisor for customers and stay up-to-date on the data solutions competitive landscape
* Partner with Product Management and Engineering to provide feedback from the field and represent the customer perspective
* Identify and write internal and external technical collateral, like typical deployment architectures or best practices and industry standards.

  
Preferred Qualifications  
  

* 5+ years in a Pre-Sales/Customer-Facing/Consulting Role
* 2+ years of experience in software development or related industries
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases or other distributed high-performance systems
* Excellent presentation skills with an ability to present technical solutions concisely to customers or potential customers all the way from development roles to the C-Suite
* Passion for diving into technical issues and solving customer challenges
* Programming skills with any one of the following: Java, Python, Javascript, .NET. C, SQL
* Experienced in at least one of the major cloud services providers (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Experienced in designing solutions on at least one major database platform including data modeling, indexes and query optimization.

  
Desirables  
  

* Experience with virtualization and containerization technologies (i.e. Docker, Kubernetes, Openshift, Containers etc)
* Experience with database platform development is a plus.
* Hands on experience with development at large scale

At Couchbase, we believe innovation thrives when diverse perspectives are at the table. We actively encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds—including women, people of color, LGTBQIA+ professionals, veterans, and individuals with disabilities. If you see a role that excites you, but don't meet every qualification, we still encourage you to apply.

Studies show underrepresented talent is less likely to apply unless they meet all the criteria. We encourage you to apply if you're excited about the role and can bring strong contributions to our team.

If you require reasonable accommodations during the recruitment process, please let your recruiter know—we're happy to support you.

We value diverse educational and career backgrounds. If your experience aligns with the role's goals—even if it doesn't follow a traditional path—we'd love to hear from you.

**Why Couchbase?**

Modern customer experiences need a flexible cloud database platform that can power applications spanning from cloud to edge and everything in between. Couchbase's mission is to simplify how developers and architects develop, deploy and consume modern applications wherever they are. We have reimagined the database with our fast, flexible and affordable cloud database platform Capella, allowing organizations to quickly build applications that deliver premium experiences to their customers– all with best-in-class price performance. More than 30% of the Fortune 100 trust Couchbase to power their modern applications and build innovative new ones. See our recent awards to learn why Couchbase is a great place to work.We are honored to be a part of the Best Places to Work Award for the Bay Area and the UK. Couchbase offers a total rewards approach to benefits that recognizes the value you create here, so that you in turn may best serve yourself and your family. Some benefits include:

* Generous Time Off Program - Flexibility to care for you and your family
* Wellness Benefits - A variety of world class medical plans to choose from, along with dental, vision, life insurance, and employee assistance programs\*
* Financial Planning - Retirement program\* and Business Travel Insurance
* Career Growth - Be valued, Create value approach
* Fun Perks - An ergonomic and comfortable in-office / WFH setup. Food & Snacks for in-office employees.
* And much more!

* Note: some programs are not applicable to all countries. Please discuss with a Couchbase recruiter to learn more.

**Learn more about Couchbase:**  
News and Press Releases  
Couchbase Capella  
Couchbase Blog  
Investors

**Disclaimer:**

Couchbase is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans' status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Join an impact initiative group and experience the amazing feeling of Couchbase can-do culture.

By using this website and submitting your information, you acknowledge our Candidate Privacy Notice and understand your personal information may be processed in accordance with our Candidate Privacy Notice following guidelines in your country of application.

**Ready to turn bold ideas into real-world impact?**  
At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. job.title: Senior AI Engineer @ Jobbycart technologies private limited (TS, IN)
job.description:
We are looking for an experienced Integration Engineer to design, build, and own the integration layer for an enterprise-grade, agentic AI document platform. The ideal candidate has a strong Java backend and microservices background, deep experience building and consuming REST APIs, and hands-on expertise integrating Microsoft SharePoint and ServiceNow with modern applications. Experience connecting these integrations to AI/LLM-powered services and agentic AI frameworks is highly valued, as the role sits at the intersection of enterprise systems integration and the platform's AI agent layer.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Enterprise System Integration**

* Build and maintain REST APIs and microservices (Java-based) that connect the agentic AI platform to SharePoint, ServiceNow, and other Microsoft ecosystem tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, MS Visio).
* Design integration specifications, data contracts, and message/event schemas between the AI agent layer and downstream/upstream enterprise systems.
* Support on-prem packaging and third-party add-in compatibility testing as part of deployment readiness.

**AI/LLM & Agent Integration**

* Integrate backend microservices with AI/LLM-powered services (Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry).
* Implement agent-to-tool and agent-to-system integration patterns, including function/tool calling and standardized protocols such as Model Context Protocol (MCP), in coordination with the AI Engineering team.
* Build the plumbing that allows AI agents to trigger, monitor, and act on workflows in SharePoint and ServiceNow (e.g., document routing, approval triggers, status callbacks).
* Collaborate with AI Engineers on exposing document parsing, validation, and rules-engine outputs through well-defined APIs consumable by agent orchestration logic (e.g., LangChain / LangGraph).

**Required Skills & Experience**

* 5–8 years of overall software engineering experience, with strong hands-on expertise in Java backend development.
* Proven experience designing and building microservices architectures and enterprise-grade REST APIs.
* Hands-on experience integrating applications with Microsoft SharePoint (bidirectional sync, document/metadata management, permissions) using SharePoint REST/Graph APIs or equivalent.
* Hands-on experience building ServiceNow integrations — REST/SOAP APIs, webhooks, ticket/job synchronization, and workflow automation.
* Working knowledge of AI/LLM-powered services (e.g., Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry) and experience exposing or consuming AI capabilities through APIs.
* Exposure to agentic AI concepts and frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, Semantic Kernel) and standardized tool/agent integration protocols such as Model Context Protocol (MCP).
* Solid understanding of RBAC, SSO/authentication (OAuth2/SAML), and audit logging for enterprise integration layers.
* Experience with API gateways, message queues/event-driven integration patterns, and asynchronous processing
* Comfortable working with Git, CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and Agile/Scrum delivery practices.
* Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills, with the ability to debug complex integration issues across distributed systems.

**Preferred / Good to Have**

* Experience integrating with vector databases (e.g., Azure AI Search, Qdrant, Pinecone) as part of RAG-enabled application integrations.
* Exposure to Python for scripting or lightweight service development alongside a primary Java stack.
* Relevant certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate / Azure Solutions Architect, or ServiceNow Certified Application Developer.

**Education**

* Bachelor's or master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).

Pay: ₹1,500,000.00 - ₹2,500,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Life insurance
* Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

* What is your Current CTC?
* What is your Expected CTC?
* How many days of your notice period?

Experience:

* AI Engineer : 5 years (Preferred)
* Java Backend Development: 8 years (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

job.description:
Full Stack- Digital Engineer

Work Time: 9am-5pm EST

Work mode: Remote

Job Type: Contract

Key responsibilities include:

· Develop and use of data systems by identifying and developing efficient ways to organize data store, and analyze data, while also paying attention to security and confidentiality.

· Understanding corrupted data and fixing coding errors and related problems

· Develop innovative and effective approaches to solve business problems through applications (Web and Mobile) approaches and communicate results and methodologies

· Analyzing, interpreting, and presenting results by means of different tools and techniques.

· Determine root cause for data integrity gaps and provide appropriate data resolution and process remedy solutions.

· Design and maintain data infrastructure and ETL processes based on industry standards and best practices.

· Design, Build and Maintain data pipelines.

· Foster an environment that emphasizes trust, open communication, creative thinking, and cohesive team effort.

The ideal candidate will possess:

· · 7 + years, Proficient in back-end languages including Java, Python, .NET, Ruby, SQL, etc

· 7 + years, hands-on experience with DevOps, CI/CD and Cyber Security tools ex. Jenkins / JIRA/ Confluence (Need to know how to build your own apps).

· 3+ years, experience with Unit Test / Regression Test / e2e Test and Subversion tools ex. GITHUB, Git , etc.

· 7+ years. Experience with building solutions that programmatically interface with 3rd party web APIs; experience with building solutions that integrate with other systems,

· Knowledge of database systems static data and real time, 5+ years.

· 5 + years, experience with reverse engineer and troubleshooting,

· 3 + years, experience of software development practices, concepts/methodologies (i.e. Waterfall, Agile, Iterative).

· 4+ years of IT experience with excellent Core and Advanced Java, C# skills (Java 8 and above)

· 4+ years. knowledge of front-end languages including HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, C++, C#, JQuery, ReactJS and React Native

· 3 + years, experience of one or more requirements analysis and problem decomposition techniques.

· Expert verbal & written communication skills; additionally, expert analytical, problem-solving, and influence skills.

· An expert ability to collaborate and act as part of a team, with a focus on cross-group collaboration

Important Note:

Ø As per the recent interview feedback, the client is looking for a Strong Java Fullstack developer with strong AWS and React skills and proficiency in OOP, DevOps, and system design.

* Full Stack- Digital Engineer: 7 years (Required)
